description_long: This is a robust, rectangular storage box with a deep brown color and a solid, industrial design. The box features a recessed top area, likely for stacking or easy access, and horizontal slats or ridges on its sides for structural reinforcement. One side displays a blurred label with Japanese katakana characters, suggesting it may be used for specific categorized storage or waste collection in urban environments. Another side has a white duck icon, possibly indicating a playful or designated use, while a third side shows small icons, likely for sorting or recycling instructions. The surface appears to be made of hard plastic, giving it durability for outdoor or public use. Its size and construction suggest it is suitable for placement on sidewalks, in parks, or near public facilities for storage or collection purposes.
description: A sturdy, brown rectangular storage box with reinforced sides, a recessed top, and distinct signage including a duck icon and Japanese text. Designed for urban use, it features a hard plastic exterior and is suitable for public or outdoor environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing a blurred Japanese label and horizontal slats, indicating the main access or identification side.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain brown surface and small icons near the bottom, likely for sorting or recycling instructions.
description_view_2: Rear view with horizontal slats and no visible signage, presenting a plain, reinforced surface.
description_view_3: Side view featuring a white duck icon on a brown background, adding a unique or playful identifier.
attribute_placement_location: floor, outdoor, sidewalk, park, public area
